title: senecio morisii
intro: Senecio morisii, also known as Moris's ragwort, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Senecio morisii can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
